learning_objective: The child recognizes Star as a friendly learning companion and responds to a simple greeting.
teacher_prompt: Wave with Star and invite each child to say hello in their own comfortable way.
parent_prompt: At home, practise a friendly hello with a wave, smile or spoken greeting.

scene.primary_focal_point: Star standing centrally, smiling and waving
scene.teacher_action: Teacher kneels at child eye level and gently models a wave
scene.child_action: Two nursery children smile and wave back
scene.environment: Bright, simple preschool welcome corner with minimal pastel classroom cues
scene.activity_space: Clear lower-right response area for the child to trace a large waving path

exact_visible_text.title: Meet Star
exact_visible_text.parent_label: Try a friendly hello at home.

star.appearance: bright yellow five-point star with softly rounded points, large expressive eyes, rosy cheeks, friendly smile, blue shoes and a small blue cape
star.pose: standing upright with one arm raised in a clear wave
